Table.Name: Command
Table.Command: SELECT T0."ClgCode" AS "ActivityNo", T0."Action" AS "Activity", T0."Priority", T1.U_NAME AS "HandledBy", T2."Name" AS "Type", T3."Name" AS "Subject", T0."Details", T0."personal", T0."Recontact" AS "StartDate", T0."BeginTime" AS "StartTime", T0."endDate" AS "EndDate", T0."ENDTime" AS "EndTime", T0."Duration", T0."DurType", T4."Name" AS "Location", T0."street" AS "AddressStreet", T0."city" AS "AddressCity", T0."room" AS "AddressRoom", T0."state" AS "AddressState", T0."country" AS "AddressCountry", T0."CardCode", T5."CardName", T6."Name" AS "ContactPerson", T0."Tel", T0."Notes", T0."DocType" AS "LinkedDocumentType", T0."DocNum" AS "LinkedDocumentNum", T0."parentType" AS "SourceDocumentType", T0."parentId" AS "SourceDocumentNum", T0."prevActvty", T0."status", T7."name" AS "TaskStatusName" FROM OCLG T0 INNER JOIN OUSR T1 ON T0."AttendUser" = T1.INTERNAL_K INNER JOIN OCLT T2 ON T0."CntctType" = T2."Code" LEFT OUTER JOIN OCLS T3 ON T0."CntctSbjct" = T3."Code" AND T2."Code" = T3."Type" LEFT OUTER JOIN OCLO T4 ON T0."Location" = T4."Code" INNER JOIN OCRD T5 ON T0."CardCode" = T5."CardCode" LEFT OUTER JOIN OCPR T6 ON T0."CntctCode" = T6."CntctCode" LEFT OUTER JOIN OCLA T7 ON T0."status" = T7."statusID" WHERE T0."ClgCode" = {?DocKey@}

FormulaFieldDefinitions.FormulaFieldDefinition: switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Håndteret af', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Bearbeitet von', True, 'Handled By' //Default English )
switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Relateret bilag', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Verknüpfter Beleg', True, 'Linked Document' //Default English )
switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Foregående aktivitet', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Vorherige Aktivität', True, 'Previous Activity' //Default English )

switch ( {Data.DurType} = 'M' , ToText({Data.Duration}, '#')+' '+{@Title_Minutes}, {Data.DurType} = 'H' , ToText({Data.Duration}, '#')+' '+{@Title_Hours}, {Data.DurType} = 'D' , ToText({Data.Duration}, '#')+' '+{@Title_Days}, TRUE , ToText({Data.Duration}, '#')+' '+{Data.DurType} )
switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Udgående forudbetalingsfaktura', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Verkaufsanzahlungsrechnung', True, 'A/R Down Payment' //Default English )
switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Indgående kreditnota', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Eingangsgutschrift', True, 'A/P Credit Memo' //Default English )
switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Indgående forudbetalingsfaktura', True, 'A/P Down Payment' //Default English )
switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Checks til betaling', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Schecks zur Zahlung', True, 'Checks for Payment' //Default English )
